# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Kafka Broker Configuration for Production Deployment

# Broker Settings
broker.id=0
broker.rack=rack1

# Listeners and Security
listeners=PLAINTEXT://0.0.0.0:9092,SSL://0.0.0.0:9093
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker-0.example.com:9092,SSL://kafka-broker-0.example.com:9093
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT,SSL:SSL
inter.broker.listener.name=PLAINTEXT

# Network Thread Settings
num.network.threads=8
num.io.threads=16
socket.send.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.receive.buffer.bytes=102400
socket.request.max.bytes=104857600

# Log Directories and Retention
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/logs-1,/var/lib/kafka/logs-2,/var/lib/kafka/logs-3
num.partitions=8
num.recovery.threads.per.data.dir=2

# Replication Settings
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
replica.lag.time.max.ms=30000
replica.socket.timeout.ms=30000
replica.socket.receive.buffer.bytes=65536
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.wait.max.ms=500

# Leader Balancing
auto.leader.rebalance.enable=true
leader.imbalance.per.broker.percentage=10
leader.imbalance.check.interval.seconds=300

# Unclean Leader Election
unclean.leader.election.enable=false

# Log Retention Settings
log.retention.hours=168
log.retention.bytes=1073741824
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000

# Log Cleanup Policy
log.cleanup.policy=delete
log.cleaner.enable=true
log.cleaner.threads=2
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.size=134217728

# Log Flush Settings
log.flush.interval.messages=10000
log.flush.interval.ms=1000
log.flush.scheduler.interval.ms=3000

# Zookeeper Connection
zookeeper.connect=zk-1.example.com:2181,zk-2.example.com:2181,zk-3.example.com:2181/kafka
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=18000
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=18000

# Topic Configuration
auto.create.topics.enable=false
delete.topic.enable=true

# Group Coordinator Settings
group.initial.rebalance.delay.ms=3000
group.min.session.timeout.ms=6000
group.max.session.timeout.ms=300000

# Compression
compression.type=producer
log.message.timestamp.type=CreateTime

# Transaction Settings
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=3
transaction.state.log.min.isr=2
transaction.state.log.num.partitions=50
transactional.id.expiration.ms=604800000

# Offsets Topic Configuration
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3
offsets.topic.num.partitions=50

# Quota Configuration
quota.window.num=11
quota.window.size.seconds=1

# Controlled Shutdown
controlled.shutdown.enable=true
controlled.shutdown.max.retries=3
controlled.shutdown.retry.backoff.ms=5000

# Message Size Limits
message.max.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.max.bytes=1048576

# Background Threads
background.threads=10

# Metadata Configuration
metadata.max.age.ms=300000

# Metrics
metric.reporters=
metrics.num.samples=2
metrics.sample.window.ms=30000

# Connection Settings
connections.max.idle.ms=600000
max.connections.per.ip=2147483647
max.connections=2147483647

# Request Handling
queued.max.requests=500
request.timeout.ms=30000

# Rack Awareness
broker.rack=rack1

# SSL Configuration (if using SSL)
ssl.keystore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.server.keystore.jks
ssl.keystore.password=changeit
ssl.key.password=changeit
ssl.truststore.location=/etc/kafka/ssl/kafka.server.truststore.jks
ssl.truststore.password=changeit
ssl.client.auth=none
ssl.enabled.protocols=TLSv1.2,TLSv1.3
ssl.keystore.type=JKS
ssl.truststore.type=JKS

# Producer Purgatory
producer.purgatory.purge.interval.requests=1000

# Fetch Purgatory
fetch.purgatory.purge.interval.requests=1000

# JMX Settings
jmx.port=9999

# Log Compaction
log.cleaner.min.cleanable.ratio=0.5
log.cleaner.delete.retention.ms=86400000
log.index.interval.bytes=4096
log.index.size.max.bytes=10485760
log.segment.delete.delay.ms=60000

# Replication Quota
follower.replication.throttled.rate=
leader.replication.throttled.rate=
replica.alter.log.dirs.io.max.bytes.per.second=

# Performance Tuning
num.replica.fetchers=4
replica.high.watermark.checkpoint.interval.ms=5000

# Security
authorizer.class.name=
allow.everyone.if.no.acl.found=true

# Consumer Offsets
offset.metadata.max.bytes=4096
offsets.load.buffer.size=5242880
offsets.retention.check.interval.ms=600000
offsets.retention.minutes=10080
offsets.commit.timeout.ms=5000

# Log Preallocate
log.preallocate=false

# Controller Settings
controller.socket.timeout.ms=30000
